data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department_name, c.credits AS credits, COUNT(c.id) AS course_count
FROM public.departments d
JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.name, c.credits
ORDER BY d.name, c.credits;

issues: Credits encoded as ordinal — may sort lexicographically; consider using quantitative type or an explicit sort to ensure numeric order of credit values.
If there are many departments the grouped bar chart may become crowded; consider filtering to a subset of departments, faceting, or using an interactive legend to toggle departments.

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

result.sql:
SELECT d.name AS department_name, c.credits AS credits, COUNT(c.id) AS course_count
FROM public.departments d
JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.name, c.credits
ORDER BY d.name, c.credits;

issues: Credits encoded as ordinal — may sort lexicographically; consider using quantitative type or an explicit sort to ensure numeric order of credit values.
If there are many departments the grouped bar chart may become crowded; consider filtering to a subset of departments, faceting, or using an interactive legend to toggle departments.
